name: orallexa-marketing-agent
description: AI marketing agent for OSS founders. Drafts platform-specific posts (X / Reddit / Bluesky / Mastodon / Dev.to / LinkedIn / Zhihu / Xiaohongshu) from a project description and recent commits. Production-grade quality gate (heuristic + LLM critic), semantic dedup, Thompson-sampling variant bandit, and a HITL approval pipeline.

capabilities.description: Generate platform-specific marketing drafts for a project. Returns N stylistic variants picked via Thompson-sampling bandit.
Score a draft post on quality (hype words, length, all-caps, hashtag spam) using heuristic + optional LLM critic.
Generate a 30/60/90-day launch plan with PH-launch-relative timing for HN and long-form retros.
Show top-performing past posts on a platform.
Best time to post on a platform based on engagement history (hour-of-week empirical CDF).
